reasoning: The control CCCS AU-3 focuses on the content of audit records, which is directly applicable to Kubernetes through its audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logs that can be configured to capture detailed information about API requests, including metadata. Ensuring audit logging is enabled, that the audit policy captures necessary metadata, and that logs are retained appropriately are key aspects of fulfilling this control. Additionally, ensuring logs are in a structured format like JSON can aid in log analysis and compliance.
title: CCCS AU-3: Content of Audit Records
